creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE=p5 GENERIC amd64

I just updated from net/phpldapadmin ver 1.2.6.3_2 to 1.2.6.3_3; it almost works. The error message shown below happens after I attempt to log in.

	Logged in as:
Fatal error: Uncaught Exception: Serialization of 'LDAP\Connection' is not allowed in /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/functions.php:622 Stack trace: #0 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/functions.php(622): serialize(Array) #1 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/functions.php(190): error('E_WARNING: ldap...', 'error', NULL, true, true) #2 [internal function]: app_error_handler(2, 'ldap_read(): Se...', 'ds_ldap.php', 419) #3 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/ds_ldap.php(419): ldap_read(Object(LDAP\Connection), 'cn=gerard,dc=se...', '(&(objectClass=...', Array, 0, 0, 0, 0) #4 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/ds_ldap.php(2217): ldap->query(Array, 'user') #5 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/ds_ldap.php(974): ldap->getDNAttrValues('cn=gerard,dc=se...', 'user') #6 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/HTMLTree.php(380): ldap->dnExists('cn=gerard,dc=se...') #7 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/HTMLTree.php(50): HTMLTree->draw_logged_in_user() #8 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/page.php(228): HTMLTree->draw() #9 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/page.php(418): page->tree() #10 /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/htdocs/cmd.php(78): page->display() #11 {main} thrown in /usr/local/www/phpldapadmin/lib/functions.php on line 622
